languages.text: "Ювенна предала вас, Лария. Эта вокс-станция — канал связи с Инквизицией. Вы сами тому свидетель".

traits.locale_text: "Ювенна предала вас, Лария. Эта вокс-станция — канал связи с Инквизицией. Вы сами тому свидетель".

languages.text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."
languages.original_text: "Ювенна предала вас, Лария. Эта вокс-станция — канал связи с Инквизицией. Вы сами тому свидетель".

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."
"Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."
"Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

languages.text: “尤文娜背叛了你，菈丽雅。这个音阵通讯站就是她与审判庭联络的专线，你也都看见了。”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜背叛了你，菈丽雅。这个音阵通讯站就是她与审判庭联络的专线，你也都看见了。”

languages.text: « Juvenna vous a trahie, Laria. Elle se sert de ce poste-vox pour communiquer avec l'Inquisition. Vous avez pu le constater par vous-même. »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

traits.locale_text: « Juvenna vous a trahie, Laria. Elle se sert de ce poste-vox pour communiquer avec l'Inquisition. Vous avez pu le constater par vous-même. »

languages.text: "Juvenna sana ihanet etti Laria. Bu voks istasyonu aracılığıyla Engizisyon'la iletişim kuruyor. Bunu bizzat gördün zaten."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna sana ihanet etti Laria. Bu voks istasyonu aracılığıyla Engizisyon'la iletişim kuruyor. Bunu bizzat gördün zaten."

languages.text: «Juvenna la ha traicionado, Laria. Esta estación de voco es su línea directa con la Inquisición. Lo ha visto con sus propios ojos».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

traits.locale_text: «Juvenna la ha traicionado, Laria. Esta estación de voco es su línea directa con la Inquisición. Lo ha visto con sus propios ojos».

languages.text: "Juvenna hat Euch verraten, Laria. Über diese Vox-Station hält sie Kontakt zur Inquisition. Ihr habt es mit eigenen Augen gesehen."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna hat Euch verraten, Laria. Über diese Vox-Station hält sie Kontakt zur Inquisition. Ihr habt es mit eigenen Augen gesehen."

languages.text: 「ジュベナは君を裏切った、ラリア。このボイスステーションは、彼女が宗教裁判所と連絡を取るためのものだ。君自身で見たことだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."

traits.locale_text: 「ジュベナは君を裏切った、ラリア。このボイスステーションは、彼女が宗教裁判所と連絡を取るためのものだ。君自身で見たことだろう。」
